page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: GEOL789V or GEOL651.

Formerly: GEOL789V.

GEOL652 Advanced Watershed and Wetland Hydrology (3 Credits) Physical and chemical processes in watershed and wetland systems: with an emphasis on redox reactions.

Prerequisite: GEOL452; or permission of CMNS-Geology department. Restriction: Non-degree-seeking students require the permission of the instructor.
